items.title: ‘I spend $7,500 a month’: I’m 47, earn $260K, and have $3 million. Can I retire at 50?
items.description: “I own a home worth $520,000 and do not have a mortgage on it.”

items.title: ‘It’s an expensive piece of equipment’: My neighbor asked to borrow my snowblower. Do I say yes?
items.description: Heavy snowfall rates of 2-3 inches per hour and gusty winds of 40-70 miles per hour hit the Northeast on Monday.

items.title: ‘I found out too late’: My stepmother cheated me out of $500K from my father’s estate. What can I do?
items.description: “Within a week or two after the deadline to contest the will expired, my stepmother sent me an email stating she would not share anything.”

items.title: This Latin American rival to Amazon reports earnings this week. How to trade it with options
items.description: The Street expects MercadoLibre will do about $28.6 billion in revenue in 2025. Operating expenses have grown faster than revenue.

items.title: Gilead Snaps Up Arcellx in $7.8B Cancer Drug Deal
items.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.

items.title: Buy this coffee and peanut butter maker as risks ease, says Bank of America
items.description: The bank said concerns about a previous acquisition and a relatively strong position to navigate GLP-1s means the stock is a buy.

items.title: The S&P 500 is caught in an unusually tight range. Is this bull market resilient or exhausted?
items.description: Mike Santoli looks at how the S&P 500 has spent nearly four months in an unusually tight range, repeatedly failing to sustain upside momentum.

items.title: UBS upgrades real estate stock hit by AI fears: 'Rare buying opportunity'
